name: aiable-architecture
description: Aiable Architecture — a discipline for building software where AI writes the code and humans own only the spec and tests.

plugins.name: aiable-architecture
plugins.description: Runs a per-capability spec → test → impl → incident flow: humans approve and freeze traceable tests before any implementation, AI generates disposable impl to satisfy them, and every failure is wired to a regression test. Provides the skill plus /aiable-spec, /aiable-test, /aiable-impl, /aiable-incident commands.
